title: Opening for Production Engineer at Emami

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Emami
jsonLd.description:
Emami has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Emami:
Emami is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emami!
